# Rings
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Rings&prop=wikitext

Rings can be used by all classes and offer a variety of stats for each situation and build
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ElithorsSoulBottle.png
| link = Elithor's Soul Bottle
| text = Elithor's Soul Bottle
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfFleshlyDesire.png
| link = Ring of Fleshly Desire
| text = Ring of Fleshly Desire
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = NecklaceOfFangs.png
| link = Necklace of Fangs
| text = Necklace of Fangs
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = YetiWalkers.png
| link = Yeti Walkers
| text = Yeti Walkers
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AmuletOfAscension.png
| link = Amulet of Ascension
| text = Amulet of Ascension
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AmuletOfDispersion.png
| link = Amulet of Dispersion
| text = Amulet of Dispersion
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BracerOfTheGuardian.png
| link = Bracer of the Guardian
| text = Bracer of the Guardian
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheTwilightGemstone.png
| link = The Twilight Gemstone
| text = The Twilight Gemstone
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheForgottenCrown.png
| link = The Forgotten Crown
| text = The Forgotten Crown
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BloodshedRing.png
| link = Bloodshed Ring
| text = Bloodshed Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = MagicalLodestone.png
| link = Magical Lodestone
| text = Magical Lodestone
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Sourcestone.png
| link = Sourcestone
| text = Sourcestone
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = OmnipotenceRing.png
| link = Omnipotence Ring
| text = Omnipotence Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = GoldMedal.png
| link = Gold Medal
| text = Gold Medal
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = AmericaRing.png
| link = America Ring
| text = America Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = IceCrown.png
| link = Ice Crown
| text = Ice Crown
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = HelmetOfThor.png
| link = Helmet of Thor
| text = Helmet of Thor
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ThorsBracelets.png
| link = Thor's Bracelets
| text = Thor's Bracelets
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = HelasHorns.png
| link = Hela's Horns
| text = Hela's Horns
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = GoldenAsgardianHelmet.png
| link = Golden Asgardian Helmet
| text = Golden Asgardian Helmet
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = ObsidianAsgardianHelmet.png
| link = Obsidian Asgardian Helmet
| text = Obsidian Asgardian Helmet
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = PlatinumAsgardianHelmet.png
| link = Platinum Asgardian Helmet
| text = Platinum Asgardian Helmet
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = RingOfOryx.png
| link = Ring of Oryx
| text = Ring of Oryx
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlack
| file = TheSoulRing.png
| link = The Soul Ring
| text = The Soul Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheConsumedRing.png
| link = The Consumed Ring
| text = The Consumed Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = ForsakenRing.png
| link = Forsaken Ring
| text = Forsaken Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfTheCosmos.png
| link = Ring of the Cosmos
| text = Ring of the Cosmos
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ExperimentalRing.png
| link = Experimental Ring
| text = Experimental Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfTheSphinx.png
| link = Ring of the Sphinx
| text = Ring of the Sphinx
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = RingOfTheNile.png
| link = Ring of the Nile
| text = Ring of the Nile
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfThePyramid.png
| link = Ring of the Pyramid
| text = Ring of the Pyramid
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = SilverMedal.png
| link = Silver Medal
| text = Silver Medal
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfTheBurning Sun.png
| link = Ring of the Burning Sun
| text = Ring of the Burning Sun
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfDecades.png
| link = Ring of Decades
| text = Ring of Decades
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = EnchantedIceShard.png
| link = Enchanted Ice Shard
| text = Enchanted Ice Shard
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Frimarra.png
| link = Frimarra
| text = Frimarra
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfTheNorthenLight.png
| link = Ring of the Northen Light
| text = Ring of the Northen Light
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfTheDestructor.png
| link = Ring of the Destructor
| text = Ring of the Destructor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfThePokerKing.png
| link = Ring of the Poker King
| text = Ring of the Poker King
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = OceanicTreasure.png
| link = Oceanic Treasure
| text = Oceanic Treasure
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfTheMysticalEncounter.png
| link = Ring of the Mystical Encounter
| text = Ring of the Mystical Encounter
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CrystallizedRingOfHatred.png
| link = Crystallized Ring of Hatred
| text = Crystallized Ring of Hatred
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = JanusEyeRing.png
| link = Janus Eye Ring
| text = Janus Eye Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = LightningGodRing.png
| link = Lightning God Ring
| text = Lightning God Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = AcidRing.png
| link = Acid Ring
| text = Acid Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = GrayBelt.png
| link = Gray Belt
| text = Gray Belt
}}
|}</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AlmandineRingOfWrath.png
| link = Almandine Ring of Wrath
| text = Almandine Ring of Wrath
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfPureWishes.png
| link = Ring of Pure Wishes
| text = Ring of Pure Wishes
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GebsRingOfWisdom.png
| link = Geb's Ring of Wisdom
| text = Geb's Ring of Wisdom
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SpectralRingOfHorrors.png
| link = Spectral Ring of Horrors
| text = Spectral Ring of Horrors
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheForgottenRing.png
| link = The Forgotten Ring
| text = The Forgotten Ring
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfTheCovetousHeart.png
| link = Ring of the Covetous Heart
| text = Ring of the Covetous Heart
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AmuletOfDrakefyre.png
| link = Amulet of Drakefyre
| text = Amulet of Drakefyre
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = HoneyCirclet.png
| link = Honey Circlet
| text = Honey Circlet
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = RustyCuffs.png
| link = Rusty Cuffs
| text = Rusty Cuffs
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Interregnum.png
| link = Interregnum
| text = Interregnum
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlack
| file = HorrificClaws.png
| link = Horrific Claws
| text = Horrific Claws
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HivemindCirclet.png
| link = Hivemind Circlet
| text = Hivemind Circlet
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = EyesOfTheFirebreather.png
| link = Eyes of the Firebreather
| text = Eyes of the Firebreather
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Candlestick.png
| link = Candlestick
| text = Candlestick
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WaterFromTheRiver.png
| link = Water from the River
| text = Water from the River
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = FlamesInAbottle.png
| link = Flames in a bottle
| text = Flames in a bottle
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SpikesOfTheTreesmasher.png
| link = Spikes of the Treesmasher
| text = Spikes of the Treesmasher
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = WingNecklace.png
| link = Wing Necklace
| text = Wing Necklace
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = PracticeTarget.png
| link = Practice Target
| text = Practice Target
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TailOfTheRiverborn.png
| link = Tail Of The Riverborn
| text = Tail Of The Riverborn
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfTheNatureGoddess.png
| link = Ring of the Nature Goddess
| text = Ring of the Nature Goddess
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">
Unique
</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SnakeEyeRing.png
| link = Snake Eye Ring
| text = Snake Eye Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SpiderEyeRing.png
| link = Spider Eye Ring
| text = Spider Eye Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CrystalBoneRing.png
| link = Crystal Bone Ring
| text = Crystal Bone Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = CandyRing.png
| link = Candy Ring
| text = Candy Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = CaptainsRing.png
| link = Captain’s Ring
| text = Captain’s Ring
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfDivineFaith.png
| link = Ring of Divine Faith
| text = Ring of Divine Faith
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = CoralRing.png
| link = Coral Ring
| text = Coral Ring
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlack
| file = BronzeMedal.png
| link = Bronze Medal
| text = Bronze Medal
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfTheEncounter.png
| link = Ring of the Encounter
| text = Ring of the Encounter
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfTheDemonLord.png
| link = Ring of the Demon Lord
| text = Ring of the Demon Lord
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = BurgerKring.png
| link = Burger K-ring
| text = Burger K-ring
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = RingOfOrtar.png
| link = Ring of Ortar
| text = Ring of Ortar
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfTheAquaticGod.png
| link = Ring of the Aquatic God
| text = Ring of the Aquatic God
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CosmicRingOfVigor.png
| link = Cosmic Ring Of Vigor
| text = Cosmic Ring Of Vigor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CosmicRingOfPotency.png
| link = Cosmic Ring Of Potency
| text = Cosmic Ring Of Potency
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CosmicRingOfOnslaught.png
| link = Cosmic Ring of Onslaught
| text = Cosmic Ring of Onslaught
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CosmicRingOfResolve.png
| link = Cosmic Ring Of Resolve
| text = Cosmic Ring Of Resolve
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CosmicRingOfPrecision.png
| link = Cosmic Ring Of Precision
| text = Cosmic Ring Of Precision
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CosmicRingOfMomentum.png
| link = Cosmic Ring Of Momentum
| text = Cosmic Ring Of Momentum
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CosmicRingOfRestoration.png
| link = Cosmic Ring Of Restoration
| text = Cosmic Ring Of Restoration
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CosmicRingOfInsight.png
| link = Cosmic Ring Of Insight
| text = Cosmic Ring Of Insight
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfUnboundHealth.png
| link = Ring of Unbound Health
| text = Ring of Unbound Health
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfUnboundMagic.png
| link = Ring of Unbound Magic
| text = Ring of Unbound Magic
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfUnboundAttack.png
| link = Ring of Unbound Attack
| text = Ring of Unbound Attack
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfUnboundDefense.png
| link = Ring of Unbound Defense
| text = Ring of Unbound Defense
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfUnboundDextery.png
| link = Ring of Unbound Dextery
| text = Ring of Unbound Dextery
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfUnboundSpeed.png
| link = Ring of Unbound Speed
| text = Ring of Unbound Speed
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfUnboundVitality.png
| link = Ring of Unbound Vitality
| text = Ring of Unbound Vitality
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfUnboundWisdom.png
| link = Ring of Unbound Wisdom
| text = Ring of Unbound Wisdom
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfExaltedHealth.png
| link = Ring of Exalted Health
| text = Ring of Exalted Health
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfExaltedMagic.png
| link = Ring of Exalted Magic
| text = Ring of Exalted Magic
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfExaltedAttack.png
| link = Ring of Exalted Attack
| text = Ring of Exalted Attack
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfExaltedDefense.png
| link = Ring of Exalted Defense
| text = Ring of Exalted Defense
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfExaltedDextery.png
| link = Ring of Exalted Dextery
| text = Ring of Exalted Dextery
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfExaltedSpeed.png
| link = Ring of Exalted Speed
| text = Ring of Exalted Speed
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfExaltedVitality.png
| link = Ring of Exalted Vitality
| text = Ring of Exalted Vitality
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfExaltedWisdom.png
| link = Ring of Exalted Wisdom
| text = Ring of Exalted Wisdom
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfParamountHealth.png
| link = Ring of Paramount Health
| text = Ring of Paramount Health
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfParamountMagic.png
| link = Ring of Paramount Magic
| text = Ring of Paramount Magic
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfParamountAttack.png
| link = Ring of Paramount Attack
| text = Ring of Paramount Attack
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfParamountDefense.png
| link = Ring of Paramount Defense
| text = Ring of Paramount Defense
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfParamountDextery.png
| link = Ring of Paramount Dextery
| text = Ring of Paramount Dextery
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfParamountSpeed.png
| link = Ring of Paramount Speed
| text = Ring of Paramount Speed
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfParamountVitality.png
| link = Ring of Paramount Vitality
| text = Ring of Paramount Vitality
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfParamountWisdom.png
| link = Ring of Paramount Wisdom
| text = Ring of Paramount Wisdom
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfSuperiorHealth.png
| link = Ring of Superior Health
| text = Ring of Superior Health
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfSuperiorMagic.png
| link = Ring of Superior Magic
| text = Ring of Superior Magic
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfSuperiorAttack.png
| link = Ring of Superior Attack
| text = Ring of Superior Attack
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfSuperiorDefense.png
| link = Ring of Superior Defense
| text = Ring of Superior Defense
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfSuperiorDextery.png
| link = Ring of Superior Dextery
| text = Ring of Superior Dextery
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfSuperiorSpeed.png
| link = Ring of Superior Speed
| text = Ring of Superior Speed
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfSuperiorVitality.png
| link = Ring of Superior Vitality
| text = Ring of Superior Vitality
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfSuperiorWisdom.png
| link = Ring of Superior Wisdom
| text = Ring of Superior Wisdom
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfGreaterHealth.png
| link = Ring Of Greater Health
| text = Ring Of Greater Health
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfGreaterMagic.png
| link = Ring Of Greater Magic
| text = Ring Of Greater Magic
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfGreaterAttack.png
| link = Ring Of Greater Attack
| text = Ring Of Greater Attack
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfGreaterDefense.png
| link = Ring Of Greater Defense
| text = Ring Of Greater Defense
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfGreaterDextery.png
| link = Ring Of Greater Dextery
| text = Ring Of Greater Dextery
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfGreaterSpeed.png
| link = Ring Of Greater Speed
| text = Ring Of Greater Speed
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfGreaterVitality.png
| link = Ring Of Greater Vitality
| text = Ring Of Greater Vitality
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RingOfGreaterWisdom.png
| link = Ring Of Greater Wisdom
| text = Ring Of Greater Wisdom
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfHealth.png
| link = Ring Of Health
| text = Ring Of Health
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfMagic.png
| link = Ring Of Magic
| text = Ring Of Magic
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfAttack.png
| link = Ring Of Attack
| text = Ring Of Attack
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfDefense.png
| link = Ring Of Defense
| text = Ring Of Defense
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfDextery.png
| link = Ring Of Dextery
| text = Ring Of Dextery
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfSpeed.png
| link = Ring Of Speed
| text = Ring Of Speed
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfVitality.png
| link = Ring Of Vitality
| text = Ring Of Vitality
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfWisdom.png
| link = Ring Of Wisdom
| text = Ring Of Wisdom
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RingOfMinorDefense.png
| link = Ring Of Minor Defense
| text = Ring Of Minor Defense
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
